text:
In this chapter:

(1) “Board” means a district’s board of directors.

(2) “Commuter rail facility” means any property necessary for the transportation of passengers and baggage between locations in a district. The term includes rolling stock, locomotives, stations, parking areas, and rail lines.

(3) “Director” means a board member.

(4) “District” means a commuter rail district created under this chapter or under Article 6550c-3, Revised Statutes, as that article existed before April 1, 2011.

(5) “System” means all of the commuter rail and intermodal facilities leased or owned by or operated on behalf of a district.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 5
### Chapter 174. Commuter Rail Districts
##### § 174.002 — Definitions

In this chapter:

    (1) “Board” means a district’s board of directors.

    (2) “Commuter rail facility” means any property necessary for the transportation of passengers and baggage between locations in a district. The term includes rolling stock, locomotives, stations, parking areas, and rail lines.

    (3) “Director” means a board member.

    (4) “District” means a commuter rail district created under this chapter or under Article 6550c-3, Revised Statutes, as that article existed before April 1, 2011.

    (5) “System” means all of the commuter rail and intermodal facilities leased or owned by or operated on behalf of a district.

*Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 85 (S.B.1540), Sec. 2.04, eff. April 1, 2011.*

subsections.text: “Board” means a district’s board of directors.

“Commuter rail facility” means any property necessary for the transportation of passengers and baggage between locations in a district. The term includes rolling stock, locomotives, stations, parking areas, and rail lines.
“District” means a commuter rail district created under this chapter or under Article 6550c-3, Revised Statutes, as that article existed before April 1, 2011.
“System” means all of the commuter rail and intermodal facilities leased or owned by or operated on behalf of a district.

history.raw: Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 85 (S.B.1540), Sec. 2.04, eff. April 1, 2011.
